title: Audit Services in Delhi | Virtual Auditor
description: Audit Services in Delhi. From ₹25,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit. Contact +91 99622 60333.
bodyText:
What is statutory audit & assurance services? Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit, concurrent audit, and stock audit by FCA-led practice.
Statutory Audit & Assurance Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Delhi, Delhi since 2012.
Quick Answer: Audit Services in Delhi — Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit, concurrent audit, and stock audit by F. From ₹25,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Statutory Audit & Assurance Services in Delhi
Virtual Auditor provides statutory audit & assurance services across Delhi. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Delhi with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Delhi handles company registrations and filings for Delhi. Stamp duty: As per Delhi schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Delhi
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your audit services is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: All companies registered under Companies Act must get audited annually. LLPs with turnover >₹40L or capital >₹25L also require audit.
Tax audit is required when business turnover exceeds ₹1 crore (₹10 crore if cash transactions <5%) or professional receipts exceed ₹50 lakhs.

faqs.q: How long does an audit take?
faqs.a: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on company size. We provide a detailed timeline at engagement stage.

faqs.q: Do you provide audit services services in Delhi?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Delhi from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Delhi?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Delhi fall under ROC Delhi. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Delhi-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Delhi?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Delhi: As per Delhi schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
